section.heading: Audit of financial transactions

content.p: The Comptroller General of the United States shall audit the Central Liquidity Facility under such rules and regulations as the Comptroller may prescribe.

section.sourceCredit: (June 26, 1934, ch. 750, title III, formerly subch. III, § 309, as added Pub. L. 95–630, title XVIII, § 1802, Nov. 10, 1978, 92 Stat. 3723; amended Pub. L. 96–221, title III, § 309(b)(1), Mar. 31, 1980, 94 Stat. 149.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section 309(b)(1) of Pub. L. 96–221 redesignated subch. III as title III of act June 26, 1934, ch. 750, cited as a credit to this section.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 1979, see section 1806 of Pub. L. 95–630, set out as a note under section 1795 of this title.
